title: Wearable Collars
description: Adds a collar accessory for players.
body:
# Collars
Adds a craftable, wearable, and dyeable collar item.
<hr>

![Crafting recipe to make the item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3090561bc8cb2f4f42ca5846473dc40a45b1d6d.png)

## Other loaders
This is my first ever mod that I made in a few days without much experience just because I couldn't find one that already existed (for Fabric). I'd like to port it to others in the future, but no guarantee.

### Should at least work on Forge with [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector).
